scripts.build: rm -rf ./dist && tsc && vite build --mode preprod && cp -r ../contract/src/managed/bboard/keys ./dist/keys && cp -r ../contract/src/managed/bboard/zkir ./dist/zkir
scripts.build:undeployed: rm -rf ./dist && tsc && vite build --mode undeployed && cp -r ../contract/src/managed/bboard/keys ./dist/keys && cp -r ../contract/src/managed/bboard/zkir ./dist/zkir
scripts.build:start: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.build:start:undeployed: npm run build:undeployed && npm run start
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
